title: arthraxon submuticus
intro: Arthraxon submuticus, also known as Bong-grass or Bong Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in China and India, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Arthraxon submuticus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Arthraxon submuticus can be prepared for consumption in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
